title: Fix INVESTIGATOR_OUTPUT_SCHEMA missing block_reason in required array
description:
The Codex API requires that every key in `properties` also appears in `required` when `additionalProperties` is false. `INVESTIGATOR_OUTPUT_SCHEMA` in `src/agent_takt/runner.py` has `block_reason` in `properties` (line 156) but not in `required` (line 158), causing Codex to reject the schema with: 'Missing block_reason'.

Fix: add `"block_reason"` to the `required` list in `INVESTIGATOR_OUTPUT_SCHEMA` so it reads:

```python
"required": ["outcome", "summary", "findings", "recommendations", "risk_areas", "report_path", "block_reason"],
```

Also audit the rest of `runner.py` for any other schema definitions (`AGENT_OUTPUT_SCHEMA`, `PLANNER_OUTPUT_SCHEMA`, nested schemas) that have the same mismatch — every property must appear in required when additionalProperties is false.
acceptance_criteria: block_reason is present in INVESTIGATOR_OUTPUT_SCHEMA required array
No other properties/required mismatches exist in runner.py schemas
